title: Boycott
content:
*Boycott* is currently the buzz word in Thailand. First, the Opposition parties boycott the next election by not sending any candidate. %(me)Which I, personally, disagree with the decision.% Now some NGO are urging people to boycott Shin's products. %(me)Which is next to impossible if your cellphone is one of your business tool.% What next? If the same PM comes back again after the election, should I boycott my nationality too?

bq.. **boycott** __v.__ withdraw from commercial or social relations with (a country, organization, or person) as a punishment or protest.

* refuse to buy or handle (goods) as a punishment or protest.
* refuse to cooperate with or participate in (a policy or event).
